channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: "48 Hours" show schedule
item.description: True crime and real justice. Missing it would be a crime.

item.title: WATCH: World Cup history in the making
item.description: The U.S. men's national team, called the "golden generation," advances with Egypt and Ivory Coast to the knockout round.

item.title: 3 firefighters killed responding to Snyder wildfire on Utah-Colorado border
item.description: Several wildfires burned across the West on Saturday.

item.title: Iran launches drone, missile attacks targeting Bahrain, Kuwait
item.description: The strikes in Kuwait and Bahrain followed a weekend of attacks between the US and Iran.
